commonIssues:
Investigations reveal numerous DLs issued in Indore/Ujjain without proper testing, fake address identities, and reliance on agents using improper OTP numbers.

How to fix: Never pay an agent for a "test-free" license. If discovered during a verification drive, your DL will be permanently cancelled. Apply individually via the Sarathi portal using your own active mobile number.

Issues with backlog data entry, high-volume automated approval processes failing verification, and faulty online MP online systems causing delays.

How to fix: For legacy licenses not visible online, submit a "DL Backlog Entry" request with physical xerox copies to your issuing MP RTO. Track your smart card dispatch status online rather than waiting indefinitely.

Problems with insurance claims being denied due to invalid, fake, or non-renewed licenses.

How to fix: Log into Parivahan/DigiLocker and verify your DL status shows as 'ACTIVE'. If it shows expired, stopped, or does not exist, standard motor insurance policies become legally void immediately.

Increased enforcement means more licenses are being suspended for offenses like riding without a helmet or untrained driving.

How to fix: Follow the MP Police traffic campaigns. Clear e-challans regularly. Ensure you are carrying a digitally verifiable or physical DL when driving, and always wear a helmet.
